FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Economic Boom
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: A surge of investment and growth is flowing through your {FACTION_TITLE}. Trade is booming, new businesses are opening, and citizens are spending freely. The prosperity of your settlements has attracted attention and opportunity. How do you channel this momentum?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Reinvest the profits. Fuel the fire of growth.
Stabilize the economy. Steady growth is better than a bubble.
Share the wealth with the people. A happy populace is the best investment.
Invest in noble estates. Let the highborn secure our prosperity.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Growth Surge
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The economic momentum is channeled directly into expanding productive capacity. New workshops open, existing operations scale up, and the prosperity of your settlements climbs at an accelerated rate.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Economic Stabilization
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Rather than chasing explosive growth, you invest in sustainable economic infrastructure. Prosperity gains are moderate but steady, and improved tax collection fills the treasury.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Wealth Distributed
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The economic windfall is shared broadly among the populace. Citizens celebrate their leaders' generosity, and the improved quality of life strengthens their dedication to your nation.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Noble Estates
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The economic windfall is channeled into grand estates for the highborn: manors, hunting grounds, and ornamental gardens that proclaim the {FACTION_TITLE}'s prosperity. The nobility responds with renewed devotion, strengthening the bonds of fealty that hold the feudal order together.
